title: Ready for Love
writer: Roy Flannagan, J.P. McEvoy, William Slavens McNutt
actors: Richard Arlen, Ida Lupino, Marjorie Rambeau
plot: Marigold Tate (Lupino) runs away from boarding school to stay with her retired aunt. She faces hostility from the locals, who display bigotry and snobbery towards her. During a witchcraft trial she is forced into a pool of water. ...
